description: DEV calibration cases: each output embeds a scripted [[dev-llm]] verdict so the dev-echo provider returns a known score. This proves the calibration MACHINERY end-to-end (agreement 1.0) — it is NOT a judgement of a real model's quality. Real calibration requires human-annotated cases (cases.json) scored by a real provider.

cases.name: grounded-answer
cases.input: How many vacation days does the standard policy grant?

cases.name: ungrounded-guess
cases.input: What is the parental leave allowance?

cases.name: correct-abstention
cases.input: What is the reimbursement rate for personal vehicle mileage?
